business_ideas.idea: FutureFit: AI fitness coaching with accountability checks via watch and text
Sleep coaching for babies: guide parents on nap schedules and sleep routines
My Body Tutor: nutrition accountability via photo uploads and weekly check-ins
WeFocus: SMS-based productivity coaching for goal tracking and daily accountability
Vertical accountability coaches: writing, relationships, fitness, triathlon training
Gratitude journaling with daily coaching and accountability messages

predictions.text: Accountability coaching will become a big category across multiple verticals beyond fitness
